name: SKY130 Lorenz Core — Three Coupled ODE Channels

trajectory_correlation.description: Cross-correlation between analog x(t) and RK4 reference over first 5 Lyapunov times (~3.4 Lorenz time units)

attractor_two_lobed.description: Phase portrait x-z shows two distinct lobes (1=yes, 0=no)

lyapunov_positive.description: Estimated largest Lyapunov exponent is positive (1=yes, 0=no)

coefficient_error_pct.description: Max error in effective σ, ρ, β vs targets (measured from trajectory fitting)

power_mw.description: Total power of the three-channel Lorenz core
